name: Whisper Local Auto
description: Auto-transcribe voice messages using local Whisper model - works across all OpenClaw channels (Feishu, Telegram, WhatsApp, etc.)
author: Xia Ge

model.description: Whisper model size to use for transcription

fallbackToApi.description: Fallback to OpenAI API if local model fails

openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API Key (optional, for fallback only)

autoInstallDeps.description: Automatically install ffmpeg and whisper on first use

keepAudioFiles.description: Keep original audio files after transcription (for debugging)

transcribeInBackground.description: Transcribe asynchronously without blocking message processing
